content: {"analyses": [{"source_url": "https://www.med.unc.edu/phyrehab/wp-content/uploads/sites/549/2019/02/2.15.2019-Wellness.pdf", "source_title": "[PDF] Intermittent fasting and health: What is the evidence?", "source_type": "web", "source_quality": 0.7, "overall_relevance": 0.65, "year": 0, "authors": [], "venue": "", "doi": "", "atomic_facts": [{"statement": "Title: PowerPoint Presentation URL Source: https://www.med.unc.edu/phyrehab/wp-content/uploads/sites/549/2019/02/2.15.2019-Wellness.pdf Publ...", "direct_quote": "Title: PowerPoint Presentation URL Source: https://www.med.unc.edu/phyrehab/wp-content/uploads/sites/549/2019/02/2.15.2019-Wellness.pdf Published Time: Mon, 09 Jun 2025 17:54:23 GMT Number of Pages: 1 Markdown Content: Words About Wellness # Intermit", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "Length of time without food may vary from 12 to 18 hours each day, depending on individuals\u2019 state of health, goals, and preference.", "direct_quote": "Length of time without food may vary from 12 to 18 hours each day, depending on individuals\u2019 state of health, goals, and preference.", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "Alternatively, intermittent fasting can involve eating every other day while fasting or greatly lowering food intake in between those days.", "direct_quote": "Alternatively, intermittent fasting can involve eating every other day while fasting or greatly lowering food intake in between those days.", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}], "evidence_summary": "Auto-extracted 3 facts."}]}
